name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Jacksonville's Cash America Pawn at 8118 Lem Turner Rd provides quick cash loans on jewelry, electronics, tools, and other items for residents across the north side.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn's Jacksonville, FL location sits at 8118 Lem Turner Rd, a convenient spot for residents across Jacksonville's north side. Open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 6PM and Saturday from 9AM to 5PM (closed Sundays), this standalone pawn shop is easily accessible for walk-in customers seeking fast pawn services.

At this Jacksonville store, you can pawn jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, and other valuable items for immediate cash—or browse and purchase quality secondhand goods at competitive prices. Call 904-766-2330 to ask about current inventory, get estimates on your items, or discuss what the shop accepts. The team handles everything from appraisal to transaction with efficiency.

If you're a Jacksonville resident facing unexpected expenses or hunting for deals on used items, Cash America Pawn on Lem Turner Rd is straightforward and fair. Bring a valid ID and your items; the process is quick and requires no credit check. This location serves the community with reliable pawn services you can count on.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states plus UK and Latin America—unmatched geographic availability
Non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property with no credit check required
Buys gold, silver, and platinum on the spot for immediate cash
Layaway service available with affordable 10% down payment option
No income verification or employment requirement for pawn loans
Wide merchandise selection—buys and sells jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods
Large retail inventory searchable by location for in-store shopping
cons: Pawn loan costs through redemption fees can be expensive compared to traditional personal loans
Pledged items may be sold if loans aren't repaid, creating loss of sentimental or valuable property
Layaway service ties up capital with only 10% down, which may not suit tight-budget consumers
Limited information on website regarding specific interest rates, fees, and loan term structures
Retail inventory and loan terms vary significantly by individual store location
best_for: Consumers who need immediate cash and own valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools) they can pledge
Individuals who cannot qualify for traditional loans due to poor credit or lack of income verification
Shoppers seeking affordable merchandise through retail sales or layaway services
People who want to sell gold, silver, or platinum jewelry quickly for cash
diagnosis: FirstCash is ideal for cash-constrained consumers who own valuable items and need immediate funds without credit checks, or for bargain shoppers seeking affordable retail goods. The main caveat is understanding that pawn loans operate through item redemption fees rather than traditional interest rates, and pledged property can be sold if loans aren't repaid—making this a collateral-based lending option, not unsecured credit.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse)
Gold, silver, and platinum buying and valuation
Retail sales of merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Store locator and inventory search tools
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions (through AFF subsidiary)
Merchandise buying (virtually any item of value)
Online store locator and contact services
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 8118 Lem Turner Rd, Jacksonville, FL. Quick pawn loans and secondhand goods for Jacksonville residents.
